titleStmt.title: SII 8.590: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 590. (A.R. No. 282 of 1903). ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE GANESA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanma hāmaṇḍalīśva raṉ harirāyavibhāṭan bhā ṣaikku tappuvarāyara kaṇṭa
ṉ pūrvvadakṣiṇapaścima Uttarasamudrādhipati śrīvīrabu kkaṇauṭaiyar kumārar
śrīvīrakampaṇauṭaiyar pradhivīrājyam paṇṇāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 2 100 9 10 6- l me
l cellāniṉṟa Ānanda varuṣattu mīna nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu pañcami yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
ro hiṇi nāḷ teṉkarai Irājagambhī ravaḷanāṭṭu cūralūrkkūṟṟattu periyaveṇma
ṇiyilirukkum paratecikaḷil vaṭakarai maṉṟaccanallūril malaiyāḷaril Aṇṇāvuṭaiyār
vaṭukappiḷḷaiyār makaḷ mātevarnācciyār makaḷ piṟaiyārkkum Ivaḷ makaṉ cokkanāyaṉārkkum teṉkarai Irācakem
piravaḷanāṭṭu cūralūrkkūṟṟattu periyaveṇmaṇi kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvakkicuramuṭaiyāṉ maḻavataraiyareṉ piṟīti
tāṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttaparicāvatu piṟaiyāḷ Eṉuṭaṉ Irukkaiyil Ivaḷukkum Ivaḷ makaṉ cokkanāyaṉārkkum
kuṭutta Ivvūril Eṉ kāṇiāṭciyāṉa naṉceynilattil tiruvaraṅkanallūr nattattukku kiḻakku melai
muṭicoḻaṉ taṭi 2- l nilam 4 Itaṉ kiḻakku Uṭcciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakku Irācentiracoḻaṉkuṇ
nilam 2 pama Uyyakkoṇṭāṉkaraikku vaṭakku vattarāyar nilattukku kiḻakku Uṭcciṟuvāykkālukku
ku paḻuppilinilattukku teṟku ce pirāṭṭi taṭi 1- l nilam 4 Iṅkuviṭṭu kiḻakku tirumālaiceranila
lattukku kiḻakku nāṟṟaṅkāl vāykkālukku kiḻakku Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku teṟku vaṇṇāṉkuṇ
ṭukku meṟkuaṭaiya Ilantaiaṭi nāṟṟaṅkāl kuṇṭu 2- l nilam
kālukku teṟku vitiviṭaṅkaṉ nilattukku kiḻakku kaṇapativayakkalukku me
ṟku vāravāykkālukku vaṭakku kaṇṭarakaṇṭaṉ taṭi 1- l nilam vaṅa Iṅkuviṭṭu kiḻakku karunālaiyaṉukku vaṭakku nā
ṟṟaṅkāl taṭikku kiḻakku Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku teṟku meṟkaṭaiya puḷiyañcey taṭi 2 l nilam 2 pam Āka nilam 9 pam Itu
vum Ivvūril maṉaiyāvatu Intap piṟaiyār kuṭiiruppāy cokkanāyaṉār piṟanta maṉaiyāṉa vaṭa
kkilteruvil naṭuvuaṭaiya maṉai 1- l kiḻmelkola 3 I Immaṉaikku puḻaikkaṭai Ellai
yāvatu vāravāykkālukku teṟku meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāga mum bhāgā śrīyamum maṟṟum Inta maṉai
kku Uḷḷa samastaprāpti kaḷum Eṉ veḷḷāṉaṭiyāril tavañceytāḷ makaḷ ceṅkaḻunīrppiḷḷaiyum nāṉ ko
ṇṭuuṭaiyeṉāṉa nallāmpiḷḷai makaṉ tāyilumnallāṉum veḷḷāṭṭi civantāḷum Ākap per muṉṟum pulai
aṭiyāril muṉṉāḷ naṅkaipurattil pāṭṭattil niṉṟa pulaiaṭiyārāy Uṭaiyar kampaṇauṭaiyar kāriyapper cantaracar
viṟka nāṉ koṇṭuuṭaiyeṉāṉa cātaṉappaṭiyāl Uḷḷa paḷḷaṉpiṟaviyum Ivaṉ paḷḷi Aḻakiyāḷum Ivaḷ makaḷ
nampāḷum Ivaḷ tampi vaḷattāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tāḻiyum Ivaṉ tampi vaḷattāṉum Ivaṉ tampi Āṇṭiyum Ākap per Ēḻu
Āka Inta vakaippaṭi nilamum maṉaiyum ciṟuppalaveḷḷāṭṭikaḷum pulaiaṭiyāraiyum prīti yāka kuṭuttu prīti kaipramā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ piṟaiyāṟkum cokkanāyiṉārkkum maḻavataraiyareṉ . Ippaṭikku kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ
tiruvakkicuramuṭaiyāṉ maḻavataraiyar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivaiy karuppūruṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappe
rumāḷ neriyaṉviḻupparaiyar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ karuppūruṭaiyāṉ kākkaināyakaṉ puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭā
reṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ceṉaikuṭaiyāṉ kaṭalaṭaittaperumāḷ Irācarācaviḻupparaiyareṉ . Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ marutūruṭaiyāṉ villavaṉ viḻupparaiyareṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ peḻākuṭaiyāṉ maturānta viḻupparaiyaṉeṉ .
Ippaṭi Aṟivom Uṭaiyār tirupparāyttuṟaiuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārum kaikkoḷamutalikaḷum . coṟppaṭikkum Ippaṭikku
Ivai koyilkkaṇakkum śrīmākecurakkaṇakkum kiḷiyūr
uṭaiyāṉ tevarkaḷcelvaṉ Eḻuttu .
raiyaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tevarkaḷcelvak kollaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ taccaṉ periyava
ṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tevarkaḷcelva taṭṭāṉeṉ . Ivar colla Inta prīti kaipramā ṇam paṇṇiṉapaṭikku Ivai tiruniyamattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.590 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
